# CWE-353 vulnerable: Missing Support for Integrity Check (positive, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-353-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"io"
	"net/http"
)

func ReceiveAgentReport(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) error {
	body, err := io.ReadAll(r.Body)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)
		return err
	}
	_, err = db.Exec("INSERT INTO agent_reports (payload) VALUES (?)", string(body))
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return err
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusAccepted)
	return nil
}
